backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor managing leads, user profiles, and admin bootstrap with access control checks and CRUD-style query/mutation methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented admin sign‑out features, associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-style list of short summaries for numerous frontend files describing page, section, and component responsibilities.
frontend/BUILD_DEPLOY_TROUBLESHOOTING.md: Troubleshooting guide outlining quick diagnostics for frontend build and deploy issues.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining color tokens, dark mode variables, and base styles applied across the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading fonts, metadata, dark mode class, and mounting the React application.
Shell script running frontend build steps with detailed logging and error trapping for diagnostics.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app handling manual routing, insight article rendering, and assembling all homepage and standalone pages.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminManag: Renders a form to grant admin privileges by validating a Principal ID and calling the backend actor method.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReset: Provides a confirmation workflow for resetting admin initialization using the admin recovery hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminToken: Allows submitting a bootstrap token to initialize the first admin, handling success and error states.
frontend/src/components/contact/CompanyP: Displays a dialog notifying users that a company profile download has started or needs retrying.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactA: Shows the company’s office address with an icon-styled visual block.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactO: Displays four contact options including booking a call, downloading a profile, emailing, and WhatsApp access.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing copyright, Caffeine.ai attribution, and dynamic year with tracked outbound link.
frontend/src/components/forms/ControlLea: Lead generation form collecting user, company, and challenge details with validation and submission handling.
frontend/src/components/forms/FounderCon: Inquiry form for the Founder Control Blueprint that gathers company details and operational bottlenecks before submitting a lead.
frontend/src/components/forms/Industries: Industry-specific lead form capturing company info and operational bottlenecks and submitting them via useLeadSubmission.
frontend/src/components/forms/InsightsNe: Newsletter subscription form collecting basic company and contact details with validation and success handling.
frontend/src/components/forms/ProcessLea: Lead form for the Process page that gathers user info and operational challenges and submits them with validation.
frontend/src/components/forms/StrategySe: A multi-field strategy session application form with validation, lead submission, success state, and reset handling.
frontend/src/components/industries/CaseS: Displays a case study card that can open a PDF or show details depending on props.
A modal that renders detailed case study sections, choosing between paragraphs or bullet lists.
frontend/src/components/industries/indus: Defines static data models and content for industries, their services, and case studies.
frontend/src/components/industries/Indus: Renders an industry section with challenges, solutions, major services, and case study cards.
frontend/src/components/industries/Major: A tile component showing a major service with an image or placeholder and a label.
frontend/src/components/ScrollToTopContr: Floating scroll‑to‑top button that appears after scrolling and uses smooth scrolling behavior.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Renders a contact section with email, phone, address, and a button to book a strategy call.
frontend/src/components/sections/Control: Renders the CONTROL framework steps with images in a scrollable/grid layout and includes navigation to the framework page.
frontend/src/components/sections/Emotion: Displays a dark-themed section highlighting founder dependency with bold messaging.
frontend/src/components/sections/FinalCt: Provides a final call‑to‑action with a heading, brief text, and a button that triggers booking a strategy call.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Wraps the hero area with a background gradient and renders the HeroSlider component.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSli: Implements an auto‑navigable and swipe‑enabled hero slider with multiple slides and CTA actions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Industr: Shows target industries in a grid of cards with icons and descriptions over a subtle background.
frontend/src/components/sections/Insight: Lists three featured insight articles with card navigation and a button to view all insights.
frontend/src/components/sections/Outcome: Presents the key business outcomes delivered by Inovics along with a dashboard visual.
frontend/src/components/sections/PageHer: A configurable hero section supporting title, subtitle, description, children, and custom backgrounds.
frontend/src/components/sections/Problem: Outlines common operational problems in a grid of icon‑text cards and reinforces the systems‑problem message.
frontend/src/components/sections/Process: Renders an accordion-based four-step process section using structured step data and UI components.
frontend/src/components/sections/TechSta: Displays a technology stack section with a responsive grid of logos sourced from a shared list.
frontend/src/components/sections/WhatIno: Shows a three-feature section highlighting control, clarity, and continuity with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/shared/StandardB: Provides reusable bullet list components with checkmark icons for displaying itemized content.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Provides a responsive top navigation bar with scroll detection, section highlighting, and custom navigation handling for hash and route links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and maintains a backend actor tied to the current identity, invalidating dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInitializatio: Fetches and tracks whether admin initialization has been completed for the current identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminLeads.ts: Retrieves admin lead data from the backend with identity-scoped caching and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminReset.ts: Implements admin reset logic with loading, success, and error state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStatus.ts: Checks whether the current caller is an admin and exposes status, errors, and retry behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealthCheck: Runs a backend health check via the actor, returning reachability status and messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and utilities for managing Internet Identity authentication and exposing identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeadSubmission.ts: Provides a hook to submit lead data to the backend with loading, success, retry, and health‑check handling.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrefersReducedMoti: Detects and returns whether the user prefers reduced motion using a media query listener.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and custom CSS variables for theming, dark mode, utilities, and reduced‑motion behavior.
frontend/src/lib/contactConfig.ts: Exports contact configuration values including URLs, email, phone, and address for external integrations.
frontend/src/lib/strategyCall.ts: Provides a function to navigate to the strategy‑session page and scroll to the top.
frontend/src/lib/techStackLogos.ts: Exports a list of tech stack logo metadata including labels, image paths, and alt text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider and renders the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Implements the admin dashboard with authentication, admin status checks, token management, and lead retrieval.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the contact page with hero content, contact methods, address, inquiry form, and qualification section.
Displays the CONTROL framework overview with hero content, explanations, and a lead‑generation call‑to‑action.
frontend/src/pages/FaqPage.tsx: Renders a FAQ page with hero, accordion-based Q&A items, and a final call-to-action section.
frontend/src/pages/IndustriesPage.tsx: Displays industry-focused content, case studies with modals, and a lead generation form with hero and sectioned layouts.
frontend/src/pages/insights/CanYourBusin: Renders a specific insight article using a shared layout and dynamically mapped sections.
frontend/src/pages/insights/components/I: Provides a layout for insight articles, including SEO setup, back-navigation, hero header, and styled content container.
frontend/src/pages/insights/components/u: Custom hook that updates the document title and meta description on mount and restores them on unmount.
frontend/src/pages/insights/CrmVsErpWhat: Displays an insight article on CRM vs ERP needs using the common article layout and content mapping.
frontend/src/pages/insights/ExcelIsNotAB: Shows an article explaining Excel limitations via the shared insight layout and section rendering.
frontend/src/pages/insights/FromFounderD: Presents an article on transitioning from founder-driven to system-driven operations using the standard article layout.
frontend/src/pages/insights/insightArtic: Defines static insight article metadata and content mapped by slug.
frontend/src/pages/insights/insightSlugs: Exports stable insight slugs, titles, ordering, and helper functions for validation and lookup.
frontend/src/pages/insights/TheHiddenCos: Renders the 'Hidden Cost of Manual Reporting' article page using InsightArticleLayout and dynamically mapped article sections.
frontend/src/pages/insights/WhyGrowthBre: Displays the 'Why Growth Breaks Weak Infrastructure' article with a shared layout and section rendering logic.
frontend/src/pages/InsightsPage.tsx: Shows a list of insight articles, updates page metadata, and includes a newsletter signup form.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessPage.tsx: Outlines the company's multi-stage transformation process with structured sections and a lead-gen call to action.
frontend/src/pages/StrategySessionPage.t: Provides details about a founder strategy session, who it's for, and includes an application form with smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session-stored parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with typography, container queries, custom colors, animations, and theme extensions.
frontend/tsconfig.node.json: TypeScript config for Node-side tooling with ESNext modules and bundler resolution.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration setting up React, env injection, path aliases, dev server proxying, and build settings.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, issues, implemented features, and pending feature requests for the Inovics Admin Recovery project.
